message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
autonumber "<b>[0]"

box "Application" #LightBlue2
    participant Application
end box

participant Node
participant Composed_VStack
participant VStack
participant State
participant NodeBuilder
participant Control.Layer
participant Renderer


== 布局树构建过程 ==

activate Application 
->Node : build 

deactivate Application  
activate Node   
-->Composed_VStack:buildNode  

deactivate Node    
 activate   Composed_VStack     
 -->VStack:setStateProperties      
 deactivate Composed_VStack       
 ->VStack:setEnvironmentProperties        
 -->>Control.Layer:addNode         
 alt [LayoutRoot]          
     --->Renderer:loadData           
 endalt         
  
 
  
 
 
 


@enduml
